title: 公平交易的定义 / Definition of fair dealing
point: 以公正、诚实、无偏见、无自利、无偏私的方式对待客户;是公平而尊重的对待。 / Dealing in a just and honest manner, free from bias, dishonesty, injustice, self-interest, prejudice and favouritism — an equitable, respectful treatment.
keyfacts: “fair”=以正当方式对待他人 / ‘Fair' = treating someone in a way that is right
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.19 — Fair Dealing s.1

title: 公平为何重要 / Why fair dealing matters
point: 唯有公平对待客户,行业才能维持投资公众的信心与信任,并减少投诉、诉讼与监管执法。 / Only fair treatment maintains the investing public's confidence and trust, and reduces complaints, lawsuits and enforcement.
keyfacts: 不公会致声誉损害与业务流失 / Unfairness brings reputational damage and lost business
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.19 — Fair Dealing s.2

title: 公平≠平等 / Fair is not equal
point: “fairly”不等于“equally”;无法同时触及所有客户,且并非每个产品都适合每位客户。 / ‘Fairly' does not mean ‘equally'; one cannot reach all clients at once, and not every product suits every client.
keyfacts: 每位客户有独特需求与目标 / Each client has unique needs and objectives
差异化服务须向所有客户披露 / Differentiated services must be disclosed to all
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.19 — Fair Dealing s.3.4–3.7

title: 三项核心原则 / Three core principles
point: (1)清晰分配角色与责任;(2)透明度;(3)管理利益冲突以避免自利结果。 / (1) Clear allocation of roles and responsibilities; (2) transparency; (3) management of conflicts of interest to avoid self-serving outcomes.
keyfacts: 关系形成时即须确立角色与责任 / Roles established when relationship is formed
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.19 — Fair Dealing s.4

title: 透明度六个关键领域 / Six key areas of transparency
point: (a)特性、(b)表现、(c)利益、(d)风险、(e)费用与收费、(f)任何特殊特征。 / (a) features, (b) performance, (c) benefit, (d) risk, (e) fees and charges, (f) any special feature.
keyfacts: 披露须可读、可理解,且及时 / Disclosure must be readable, understandable and timely
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.19 — Fair Dealing s.4.5

title: 第三方报酬冲突的处理 / Managing third-party-compensation conflict
point: 三种途径:(a)增强透明度;(b)责任归于支付报酬的第三方;(c)由客户直接付酬。 / Three approaches: (a) enhance transparency; (b) place responsibility on the paying third party; (c) require direct payment by the client.
keyfacts: 行为标准随客户关系类型而变化 / Standard of conduct varies with relationship type
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.19 — Fair Dealing s.4.7–4.9

title: MAS FAA-G11 责任主体 / FAA-G11 responsibility
point: MAS 发布 FAA-G11,把交付公平交易成果的责任置于董事会与高级管理层。 / MAS issued Guideline FAA-G11, placing responsibility for delivering fair dealing outcomes on the Board and Senior Management.
keyfacts: 涵盖选择、营销、分销、建议、售后与投诉处理 / Covers selection, marketing, distribution, advice, after-sales, complaints
鼓励应用于零售客户以外的客户与产品 / Encouraged beyond retail clients/products
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.19 — Fair Dealing s.5.5–5.8; MAS FAA-G11

title: 五项公平交易成果 / Five fair dealing outcomes
point: (1)公平交易居文化核心的信心;(2)产品适合目标客户;(3)称职代表给优质建议;(4)清晰相关及时的信息;(5)独立有效迅速处理投诉。 / (1) confidence fair dealing is central to culture; (2) products suit target clients; (3) competent reps give quality advice; (4) clear, relevant, timely information; (5) complaints handled independently, effectively, promptly.
keyfacts: FAA-G11 列出五项成果 / FAA-G11 sets out five outcomes
五项成果反映三项核心原则 / The outcomes reflect the three core principles
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.19 — Fair Dealing s.5.12; MAS FAA-G11
